allow: Bash(sl issue create --title "US1+US2: Slash Command and Agent Integration" --description "WHY: Users need a /specledger.commit command for auth-aware commit workflow. Agent should invoke it when users ask to commit via chat." --design "Create pkg/embedded/skills/commands/specledger.commit.md with YAML frontmatter. Workflow: check staged -> commit -> check auth -> capture session \(if applicable\) -> push -> show summary. Uses $ARGUMENTS for optional commit message. Instructs agent to use this command for chat commit requests." --acceptance-criteria "Slash command commits and pushes in all auth states. Agent uses it for chat commit requests. Claude built-in /commit unaffected." --dod "specledger.commit.md created with YAML frontmatter" --dod "Workflow handles all auth states \(no creds, creds+no project, creds+project\)" --dod "Agent instruction included for chat commit requests" --dod "sl bootstrap copies command to .claude/commands/" --type feature --parent SL-482b2c --labels "spec:602-silent-session-capture,phase:us1-us2,story:US1,story:US2,component:skills" --priority 1)

Bash(sl issue create --title "US4: Silent Skip in PostToolUse Hook" --description "WHY: The PostToolUse hook spams stderr warnings for unauthenticated users on every commit. Must silently skip when no credentials or no project ID." --design "In pkg/cli/session/capture.go: Move auth.LoadCredentials\(\) to right after tool success check \(before project ID\). Return result with nil error when no credentials. Remove stderr warnings for missing project ID, return silently. No changes needed in commands/session.go." --acceptance-criteria "Zero stderr output when hook runs without credentials or without project ID. Exit code 0 in all cases." --dod "Credentials check moved before project ID check in Capture\(\)" --dod "Silent return \(nil error\) when no credentials" --dod "Silent return \(nil error\) when no project ID" --dod "No stderr warnings for missing auth/project" --dod "Existing tests updated to match new flow" --type feature --parent SL-482b2c --labels "spec:602-silent-session-capture,phase:us4,story:US4,component:session" --priority 2)

Bash(sl issue create --title "US3: Error Logging Integration" --description "WHY: Authenticated users with synced projects need persistent error records when capture fails. Errors must be logged to both local file and Supabase for troubleshooting." --design "Integrate LogCaptureError\(\) into capture.go \(when upload/metadata creation fails\) and queue.go \(when ProcessQueue retry fails\). Errors logged to both local JSONL file and Supabase table. Error includes user_id, project_id, session_id, error_message, feature_branch, commit_hash, retry_count." --acceptance-criteria "All capture failures for authenticated users logged to both local file and Supabase. sl session sync retry failures also dual-logged. Logging never blocks commit/push." --dod "LogCaptureError\(\) called on upload failure in capture.go" --dod "LogCaptureError\(\) called on retry failure in queue.go" --dod "Error includes all required fields \(user_id, project_id, session_id, etc.\)" --dod "Local log written first, Supabase best-effort" --dod "Logging never blocks workflow" --type feature --parent SL-482b2c --labels "spec:602-silent-session-capture,phase:us3,story:US3,component:session" --priority 2)
